brief_notes: Comprehensive network analysis of the FlyWire Drosophila whole-brain connectome (127,978 neurons). Strong quantitative results on rich club organization, motif analysis, and neuropil-level connectivity. Well-organized with clear progression from whole-brain to neuropil-level analysis. Statistical comparisons to null models are rigorous. Loses points for missing figures/tables in the tex, and some results sections could benefit from deeper biological interpretation. The 30% rich club fraction finding and comparison to C. elegans (4%) is compelling.
